Mercury and Guardian both confirm BTC all 4 timeframes (15m/1h/4h/1d) database is locked. ETH pipeline normal. BTC last kline: 2026-06-21 17:30 UTC. Root cause: data/market.db uses DELETE journal mode, 8 concurrent writers cause write-lock contention. Fix: PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL in storage.py or pipeline.py. Also: oracle.json data_fresh=true is misleading -- BTC is stale. Separate BTC/ETH freshness tracking. Restart pipeline after WAL fix to verify BTC resumes.
